summary: Detailed analysis and implementation plan for consolidating the fragmented Trinity Protocol configuration. Maps 7+ source files with duplication across 3-6-2 framework (4x), Guard system (5x), and Heart Disease specifics (3x). Proposes a new 7-section layered GEMINI.md v4.0 (~150 lines in imperative format replacing 369+ Q&A lines across 5 files). Includes creation of tactic_registries/ for domain-specific knowledge, archival plan for absorbed files, and verification steps.
